languages.text: {n}Злорадная улыбка трогает губы Эоганна.{/n} "Да. Его это невероятно злит".
{n}A gloating smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "It galls him beyond measure."

languages.text: {n}Ein hämisches Lächeln huscht über Eogunn Lippen.{/n} "Das wird ihn unglaublich ärgern."
languages.original_text: {n}A gloating smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "It galls him beyond measure."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein hämisches Lächeln huscht über Eogunn Lippen.{/n} "Das wird ihn unglaublich ärgern."

languages.text: {n}Les lèvres d'Eogunn s'étirent en un sourire sardonique.{/n} « Cela l'exaspère au plus haut point. »
languages.original_text: {n}A gloating smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "It galls him beyond measure."

traits.locale_text: {n}Les lèvres d'Eogunn s'étirent en un sourire sardonique.{/n} « Cela l'exaspère au plus haut point. »

languages.text: {n}Una mirada burlona llega a los labios de Eogunn.{/n} «Le irrita más allá de toda lógica».
languages.original_text: {n}A gloating smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "It galls him beyond measure."

traits.locale_text: {n}Una mirada burlona llega a los labios de Eogunn.{/n} «Le irrita más allá de toda lógica».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un dudaklarında sinsice bir gülümseme beliriyor.{/n} "Bu onu epey bir sinirlendiriyor da."
languages.original_text: {n}A gloating smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "It galls him beyond measure."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn'un dudaklarında sinsice bir gülümseme beliriyor.{/n} "Bu onu epey bir sinirlendiriyor da."

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡的嘴角勾起一抹讥讽的笑意。{/n}“这对他来说可是折磨。”
languages.original_text: {n}A gloating smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "It galls him beyond measure."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡的嘴角勾起一抹讥讽的笑意。{/n}“这对他来说可是折磨。”

languages.text: {n}してやったりという笑みが、エオガンの唇に浮かぶ。{/n}「奴は、この上なく腹を立てているのです」
